description_long: This is a classic freestanding clawfoot bathtub with a gently sloped, high-back design and a deep, oval basin. The exterior is finished in a dark color, contrasting with the smooth, glossy white interior. Four ornate claw-and-ball feet support the tub, elevating it above the ground and adding a vintage aesthetic. At one end, a set of exposed metal plumbing fixtures, including a faucet and hand shower, are mounted above the rim, with visible supply pipes extending to the floor. The tub features a visible drainage hole at the base of the interior. The overall appearance is elegant and robust, suitable for upscale or historic urban environments.
description: A freestanding clawfoot bathtub with a glossy white interior, dark exterior, and ornate metal feet, featuring exposed plumbing fixtures and a visible drain.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the tub, ornate claw feet, and the plumbing fixtures at one end.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the deep, oval basin and the faucet assembly on the right side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the exposed plumbing pipes and fixtures, with all four feet visible.
description_view_3: End view from the opposite side, showing the sloped back and the drain at the base.
